headline: Hanover Insurance Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Lower Cat Losses
summary: The Hanover Insurance Group's Q1 operating EPS rose 36% to $5.25, beating estimates as pricing and loss trends drove a record 20.3% ROE.

raw.headline: Hanover Insurance Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Lower Cat Losses
raw.summary: The Hanover Insurance Group's Q1 operating EPS rose 36% to $5.25, beating estimates as pricing and loss trends drove a record 20.3% ROE.

headline: ALL Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Underwriting, Lower Expenses
summary: Allstate's Q1 earnings surge 202% as strong underwriting, higher premiums and lower catastrophe losses drive a major profit beat.

raw.headline: ALL Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Underwriting, Lower Expenses
raw.summary: Allstate's Q1 earnings surge 202% as strong underwriting, higher premiums and lower catastrophe losses drive a major profit beat.

headline: AXIS Capital Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Solid Underwriting Income
summary: AXS beats Q1 estimates as underwriting income climbs and premiums grow, offsetting weaker investment income and higher expenses.

raw.headline: AXIS Capital Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Solid Underwriting Income
raw.summary: AXS beats Q1 estimates as underwriting income climbs and premiums grow, offsetting weaker investment income and higher expenses.
